use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH GASTROINTESTINAL STROMAL TUMOR (GIST), INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO PATIENTS PREVIOUSLY TREATED WITH IMATINIB AND PATIENTS WITH GIST HAVING RESISTANCE TO A KIT TYROSINE KINASE INHIBITOR
